slots.girlfriend: 3 bed in budget, in district, move-in ready
slots.other_woman: $889K listing with a wine fridge and a barn

caption_draft.ig: Their lender has not approved them for the wine fridge.

calibration_notes: Concrete dollar amounts ($625K vs $889K = $264K spread). Specific objects (wine fridge, barn) every Bend buyer recognizes as 'the thing that pulled me past my budget.' Caption pivots to the lender, who is the unbothered third party every agent has to call after the showing.
